title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, embed with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama chat, generate, and embed components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user); formerly Ollama-WebUI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ready to clone and extend.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing how to expose Python functions as tools to Ollama chat.

title: ollama-gpu
summary: Community Dockerfiles and scripts for running Ollama with CUDA & ROCm acceleration.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client written in Rust; keyboard-centric, markdown rendering, themes.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for vision, voice, function-calling, and edge deployment.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, reactive streams, Android compatible.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, generate, embed, and list models; built on Refit.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST endpoints; async/await tokio based.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats via Ollama; slash commands, thread support, rate limits.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that streams Ollama responses into threads; supports vision models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to query local Ollama models from within notes; templating & prompt snippets.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds “Ask Ollama” commands and sidebar chat; uses official JS client.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated collection of custom Modelfiles for code, SQL, role-play, and quantized variants.
